name: Peanut Butter Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees with the rack in the top third position.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt onto a piece of wax paper.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter and peanut butter until creamy.
4. Gradually add 1/2 cup granulated sugar and all the brown sugar. Beat until light in color and consistency.
5. Beat in egg, milk, and vanilla extract.
6. Using a wooden spoon, stir in the flour mixture.
7. In a small bowl, place remaining granulated sugar.
8. Using a tablespoon of dough for each, form balls and roll them in sugar to coat evenly.
9. Place the cookies 1-1/2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
10. Bake until edges are set, about 8 minutes. Remove from oven.
11. Place a kiss in the center of each cookie. Return to the oven.
12. Continue baking until lightly browned, about 2 minutes longer.
13. Cool cookies on the sheet for 5 minutes, then transfer to wire cake racks to cool.
14. Repeat with remaining cookies.
